name: Candice Corgine
bio:
Physical Appearance: Breton female wearing a lower-class outfit appropriate for an innkeeper.
Race: Breton
Personality Keywords: publican, innkeeper, tireless, merchant, available, dedicated
Role: Candice Corgine is the proprietor of The Sleeping Mare, a small inn located in Pell's Gate. She operates as both innkeeper and merchant, buying potions and food while selling alchemy apparatus, potions, soul gems, and ingredients. She carries the inn key and a sum of gold for transactions.
Home Location Information: The Sleeping Mare in Pell's Gate.
Daily Routine: Candice never eats or sleeps, making her services available 24 hours a day. She remains at the inn at all times to serve customers.
Personality - The Tireless Innkeeper: Candice is dedicated to running The Sleeping Mare, maintaining constant availability for her guests and customers. She manages both the hospitality and merchant aspects of the inn without rest.
author: Bethesda
